fields.name: machineryID
fields.description: Reference to the Machinery collection that this activity belongs to. Links maintenance activities to specific equipment on vessels.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleID
fields.description: Reference to the MaintenanceSchedule collection if this activity is part of a scheduled maintenance program. Null for ad-hoc activities.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Short descriptive text of the maintenance activity to be performed, such as 'Oil change' or 'Valve inspection'.

fields.name: intervalDuration
fields.description: Human-entered interval text specifying how often this activity should be performed (e.g., '500', '6', 'annual'). Works with intervalDurationType.

fields.name: intervalDurationType
fields.description: Unit for interpreting intervalDuration field. Defines the time unit for maintenance scheduling intervals.

fields.name: adhocInterval
fields.description: Non-standard cadence indicator for activities that don't follow regular time intervals, such as voyage-based or condition-based maintenance.

fields.name: lastDoneOn
fields.description: Date when this activity was last completed successfully. Used for calculating next due dates and maintenance history tracking.

fields.name: workHistory
fields.description: Array of ActivityWorkHistory collection IDs that represent all execution instances of this activity over time. Array of references to ActivityWorkHistory (collection: ActivityWorkHistory).

fields.name: expectedManHours
fields.description: Estimated labor hours required to complete this activity. Used for resource planning and scheduling.

fields.name: expectedCost
fields.description: Estimated total cost for completing this activity including labor and parts. Used for budgeting and cost planning.

fields.name: department
fields.description: Department classification for this activity. Used for filtering and organizing activities by responsible department.

fields.name: requireClassSurvey
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this activity requires class surveyor attendance or approval.

fields.name: allowClassSurveyException
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if exceptions to class survey requirements can be granted for this activity.

fields.name: isStatutoryCompliance
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this activity is required for statutory compliance (SOLAS, MARPOL, etc.).

fields.name: isCritical
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this activity is critical for vessel operations or safety.

fields.name: requiredRank
fields.description: Rank code (e.g., 'CHENG', 'MST') or 'any' required to perform this activity.

fields.name: requiredCompetency
fields.description: Numeric competency level (1-5) required to perform this activity.

fields.name: requiresContractor
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if an external contractor is required for this activity.

fields.name: ptwConfig
fields.description: Configuration object for Permit to Work requirements. Contains: isPTWRequired (boolean), ptwTypeIds (array of strings), ptwFormTemplateIDs (array of ObjectId references to FormTemplate).

fields.name: requiredParts
fields.description: Array of estimated parts requirements for activity execution. Each object contains: partID (ObjectId reference to InventoryPart), estimatedQuantity (number of units needed), and isCritical (boolean flag indicating if part is critical for activity completion).

fields.name: estimatedPartsCost
fields.description: Calculated total estimated cost of all required parts for this activity. Derived from requiredParts array.

fields.name: maintenanceSteps
fields.description: Embedded object containing detailed maintenance procedure information. Contains: notesHtml (rich text instructions), documentIDs (array of ObjectId references to DocumentMetadata for procedures/manuals), updatedBy (ObjectId reference to User who last modified), and updatedAt (timestamp of last modification).

fields.name: needsPortStay
fields.description: Indicates if the activity requires a port stay for execution.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp for createdAt on Activity.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp for updatedAt on Activity.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and access control.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleID
fields.description: Reference to MaintenanceSchedule collection linking this work history to a specific maintenance program for reporting and tracking.

fields.name: activityID
fields.description: Reference to the parent Activity collection that this work history execution belongs to. Links execution records to activity definitions.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection providing vessel context for quick queries, reporting, and filtering by vessel.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this is the current/latest work history entry for the activity. Only one entry per activity should be active.

fields.name: committed
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this work history has been finalized and committed. Committed entries cannot be modified.

fields.name: events
fields.description: Array of ActivityWorkHistoryEvent collection IDs representing the detailed execution timeline and steps performed during this work history. Array of references to ActivityWorkHistoryEvent (collection: ActivityWorkHistoryEvent).

fields.name: plannedDueDate
fields.description: Scheduled date when this maintenance work is planned to be completed. Used for scheduling and overdue tracking.

fields.name: previousDueDate
fields.description: Previous due date before any rescheduling occurred. Maintains audit trail of schedule changes.

fields.name: validatedForms
fields.description: Array of form validation status objects containing formTemplateID (objectid to FormTemplate), formData (string key against value) , validated (true if validated, false otherwise), validatedAt, validatedBy (objectid to User), rejected(true if rejected hence still draft),rejectedAt, rejectedBy (objectid to User)for forms associated with this work history.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp for createdAt on ActivityWorkHistory.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp for updatedAt on ActivityWorkHistory.

fields.name: classInspectionCompleted
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the required class inspection has been completed for this work history execution. Used for compliance tracking at the work history level.

fields.name: ptwConfig
fields.description: Snapshot of PTW configuration at the time of work history creation. Contains isPTWRequired, ptwTypeIds, and ptwFormTemplateIDs.

fields.name: isFailureEvent
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this work history represents a failure event.

fields.name: failureCause
fields.description: Description of the cause of failure if isFailureEvent is true.

fields.name: failureSeverity
fields.description: Severity of the failure (minor, moderate, major, critical).

fields.name: isUnplannedMaintenance
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this maintenance was unplanned.

fields.name: requiresFollowUp
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if further action is required after this work.

fields.name: needsDrydock
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this work requires dry dock facilities.

fields.name: isNonConformity
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this work is related to a non-conformity report.

fields.name: machineryRunningHours
fields.description: Running hours of the machinery at the time of this work history.

fields.name: relatedPartIDs
fields.description: Array of InventoryPart ObjectIds related to this failure or maintenance event.

fields.name: childAWHIds
fields.description: Array of child ActivityWorkHistory ObjectIds spawned from this one.

fields.name: parentAWHId
fields.description: ObjectId reference to the parent ActivityWorkHistory if this is a child work history.

fields.name: hasDowntime
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this work caused operational downtime.

fields.name: downtimeStartDate
fields.description: Start date and time of the downtime.

fields.name: downtimeEndDate
fields.description: End date and time of the downtime.

fields.name: downtimeDescription
fields.description: Description of the downtime event.

fields.name: operationalImpact
fields.description: Impact of the downtime on operations (none, minor, major, critical).

fields.name: latestEventID
fields.description: Denormalized reference to the most recent ActivityWorkHistoryEvent.

fields.name: latestEventStatus
fields.description: Denormalized status of the most recent event.

fields.name: latestEventDate
fields.description: Denormalized date of the most recent event.

fields.name: latestEventDescription
fields.description: Denormalized description of the most recent event.

fields.name: latestEventPerformedBy
fields.description: Denormalized user name or ID who performed the most recent event.

fields.name: estimatedManHours
fields.description: Estimated labor hours for this specific work history instance. Used for planning crew workload and comparing against sum of actualManHours from all events to calculate variance.

fields.name: isBlocked
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if the work history is currently blocked by an external dependency.

fields.name: blockageReasons
fields.description: Array of reasons for the blockage (waiting_parts, waiting_ptw, etc.).

fields.name: blockageNote
fields.description: Optional free-text note providing details about the blockage.

fields.name: blockedSince
fields.description: Timestamp when the blockage was first recorded.

fields.name: triggerSource
fields.description: Object documenting the origin of this work history (planned, form_finding, class_observation, manual, temporary_fix_followup) and optional linkage to the source form/field.

fields.name: qualityErrors
fields.description: Array of structured quality error entries recorded against this work history, including code, category, severity, description, detectedBy and linkedFormID. Used for training gap analysis and quality monitoring.

fields.name: repairType
fields.description: Classification of the repair outcome (permanent, temporary, interim). Tracks the physical state of the asset after work completion.

fields.name: temporaryFixExpiryDate
fields.description: Expiration date for a temporary repair. Used for compliance monitoring and lifecycle alerting.

fields.name: activityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to the parent ActivityWorkHistory collection that this event belongs to. Links individual work steps to the overall work history execution.

fields.name: performedOn
fields.description: Timestamp when this specific maintenance event or work step was performed. Used for chronological tracking of work execution.

fields.name: performedBy
fields.description: Reference to the User who performed this specific work event. Tracks individual accountability for maintenance steps.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Free-text description of the specific maintenance step, observation, or action performed during this event.

fields.name: activityCompletionStatus
fields.description: Lifecycle status of the overall activity at the time of this event. Tracks progression through maintenance workflow states.

fields.name: maintenanceType
fields.description: Classification of the type of maintenance work represented by this event. Used for categorizing and reporting maintenance activities.

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Additional free-text comments or observations recorded during this maintenance event.

fields.name: documents
fields.description: Array of file identifiers or paths for documents attached to this specific work event, such as photos, reports, or certificates.

fields.name: riskAssessment
fields.description: Reference or notes for risk assessment documentation linked to this maintenance event.

fields.name: damageDeficiency
fields.description: Notes documenting any damage, deficiencies, or issues observed during this maintenance event.

fields.name: actualManHours
fields.description: Actual labor hours spent on this specific maintenance event. Used for tracking actual execution time and calculating variance against AWH.estimatedManHours.

fields.name: specialComments
fields.description: Special instructions, warnings, or important remarks related to this maintenance event.

fields.name: partsUsed
fields.description: Array of references to MaintenancePartUsage records documenting parts consumed during this work event. Array of references to MaintenancePartUsage (collection: MaintenancePartUsage).

fields.name: actualPartsCost
fields.description: Actual total cost of parts used during this specific maintenance event.

fields.name: crewMembersAssigned
fields.description: Array of references to CrewMember records assigned to this maintenance event. Used for tracking which crew performed the work and for crew workload analysis.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp for createdAt on ActivityWorkHistoryEvent.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp for updatedAt on ActivityWorkHistoryEvent.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization (collection: Organization) by ObjectId for CrewMember.organizationID.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: Crew member given name used for identification.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Crew member family name used for identification and sorting.

fields.name: rank
fields.description: Rank of the crew member such as officer, engineer, rating or specialist. Used for man-hour and staffing analysis.

fields.name: competencyLevel
fields.description: Optional numeric competency level for this crew member (for example 1 to 5). Used for skill and training analysis.

fields.name: employmentStatus
fields.description: Current employment status of the crew member such as active, off-hire or inactive.

fields.name: userID
fields.description: Optional reference to User (collection: User) if this crew member has a linked application user account.

fields.name: contractPeriods
fields.description: Array of contract period objects with startDate, optional endDate, vesselID and contract documentIDs. Used for vessel assignment history and contract analysis.

fields.name: employmentHistory
fields.description: Array of employment history entries capturing hire, off-hire and re-hire events with dates and reasons.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization (collection: Organization) by ObjectId for CrewAssignment.organizationID.

fields.name: crewMemberID
fields.description: Reference to the CrewMember assigned in this record. Links assignment to personal and contract information.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Optional reference to Vessel (collection: Vessel) when this assignment is scoped at vessel level.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleID
fields.description: Optional reference to MaintenanceSchedule (collection: MaintenanceSchedule) when assignment is scoped to a schedule.

fields.name: activityID
fields.description: Optional reference to Activity (collection: Activity) when assignment is scoped directly to an activity or job.

fields.name: assignmentType
fields.description: Classification of the assignment such as permanent, riding crew or contractor. Used to separate core crew from temporary or contractor resources.

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: Start date of this crew assignment.

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: Optional end date of this crew assignment when completed or relieved.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the assignment such as planned, active, completed or relieved.

fields.name: rank
fields.description: Rank at which the crew member is serving for this assignment. May override the base crew rank for specific postings.

fields.name: role
fields.description: Free-text role or position description for this assignment such as watchkeeper or fitter.

fields.name: shiftPatternID
fields.description: Optional reference to ShiftPattern (collection: ShiftPattern) used for this assignment.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization (collection: Organization) by ObjectId for ShiftPattern.organizationID.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Optional reference to Vessel (collection: Vessel) if this pattern is vessel-specific.

fields.name: patternName
fields.description: Human-readable name for the shift pattern such as 4 on 8 off watch or daywork.

fields.name: patternType
fields.description: Type of shift pattern such as watch, daywork or custom.

fields.name: shifts
fields.description: Array of shift items with startTime, endTime and activityType describing the watch or work blocks.

fields.name: applicableRanks
fields.description: Array of rank identifiers for which this shift pattern is applicable.

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this is the default shift pattern for the given organization or vessel.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization (collection: Organization) by ObjectId for WorkRestRecord.organizationID.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel (collection: Vessel) where the work/rest record was logged.

fields.name: crewMemberID
fields.description: Reference to CrewMember (collection: CrewMember) for whom this work/rest record applies.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Vessel-local date for which work and rest hours are recorded.

fields.name: workPeriods
fields.description: Array of work period entries capturing start and end times, work activity type and optional related ActivityWorkHistory reference.

fields.name: restPeriods
fields.description: Array of rest period entries capturing start and end times and rest type.

fields.name: totalWorkHours
fields.description: Computed total work hours for the day for this crew member.

fields.name: totalRestHours
fields.description: Computed total rest hours for the day for this crew member.

fields.name: complianceStatus
fields.description: Nested object capturing whether the record is compliant with work/rest regulations and any violations.

fields.name: exceptions
fields.description: Array of exception records for emergencies or safety-critical deviations including compensatory rest tracking.

fields.name: enteredBy
fields.description: Reference to User (collection: User) who entered this work/rest record.

fields.name: verifiedBy
fields.description: Optional reference to User (collection: User) who verified this work/rest record.

payload.business_purpose: Stores live form instances generated from templates for vessel routines, maintenance evidence, proxy workflows, and crew-assigned recurring submissions. These records are the operational form layer users submit and commit, and they can be linked directly to maintenance execution history for compliance and audit traceability.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable title of the generated form instance.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional operational context or summary carried on the form instance.

fields.name: formTemplateID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplate (collection: FormTemplate) that defines the structure and questions for this runtime form.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel (collection: Vessel) when the form is scheduled or submitted in vessel context; optional for org-wide proxy or crew forms.

fields.name: crewMemberID
fields.description: Reference to CrewMember (collection: CrewMember) when the form is assigned directly to an individual seafarer.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Organization identifier that owns the form instance and workflow.

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: Start date from which the form schedule or obligation becomes active.

fields.name: intervalValue
fields.description: Recurrence interval value used for scheduled or recurring forms.

fields.name: intervalUnit
fields.description: Recurrence unit that determines how the next due date is calculated.

fields.name: nextDueDate
fields.description: Next planned due date for the live form instance.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Workflow status of the form instance after user action.

fields.name: formData
fields.description: Submitted answers and structured payload captured from the dynamic template at runtime.

fields.name: submittedBy
fields.description: Reference to User (collection: User) who submitted the form for review or validation.

fields.name: submittedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the form was submitted.

fields.name: committedBy
fields.description: Reference to User (collection: User) who committed the form as final evidence or completion.

fields.name: committedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the form was committed.

fields.name: isProxy
fields.description: True when the form is a proxy/generated instance derived from another assignment pattern.

fields.name: activityMappingID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplateActivityMapping (collection: FormTemplateActivityMapping) when the form is required by a maintenance activity rule.

fields.name: activityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to ActivityWorkHistory (collection: ActivityWorkHistory) when the form serves as evidence for a maintenance execution record.

fields.name: proxyFormID
fields.description: Reference to Form (collection: Form) when this instance was cloned from another form record.

fields.name: vesselMappingID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplateVesselMapping (collection: FormTemplateVesselMapping) that scheduled this form for a vessel.

fields.name: crewMappingID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplateCrewMapping (collection: FormTemplateCrewMapping) that scheduled this form for a crew member.

fields.name: isAdhoc
fields.description: True when the form was raised outside the normal recurring schedule.

fields.name: templateSnapshot
fields.description: Frozen snapshot of the template structure/content used when the form instance was generated.

fields.name: createdByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User (collection: User) who created the form instance.

fields.name: updatedByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User (collection: User) who last updated the form instance.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the form instance was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the form instance was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Captures the workflow and audit trail for each Form instance, including submit, commit, reject, and reset actions. This collection is important for understanding operational approvals, rejection reasons, and who changed the form state.

fields.name: formID
fields.description: Reference to Form (collection: Form) whose workflow event is being recorded.

fields.name: actionType
fields.description: Workflow action taken against the form instance.

fields.name: actionBy
fields.description: Reference to User (collection: User) who performed the workflow action.

fields.name: actionAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the workflow action happened.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Optional explanatory note, review remark, or rejection message stored with the action.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Organization identifier used to scope the audit history.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the history row was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the history row was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Acts as the retry queue for slice-based file synchronization and deferred uploads. It preserves failed or pending file transfers with attempt counters, error state, and priority so edge or sync workflows can resume safely without losing file context.

fields.description: Logical file identifier used to deduplicate and track the upload across retries.

fields.description: Target storage bucket or container where the file should be uploaded.

fields.description: Original filename being transferred through the sync queue.

fields.name: contentType
fields.description: Optional MIME type captured from the original upload request.

fields.description: Reference to SyncSlice (collection: SyncSlice) that groups the upload within a synchronization batch.

fields.description: Organization identifier that owns the pending upload.

fields.name: vesselID

fields.description: Identifier of the source client or sync instance that produced the file task.

fields.description: Dynamic file metadata preserved from the original upload request for replay or auditing.

fields.description: Dynamic metadata leaf values stored alongside the pending upload.

fields.name: uploadAttempts
fields.description: Number of upload attempts already made for this file.

fields.name: maxRetries
fields.description: Maximum retry count allowed before the file is treated as failed.

fields.name: lastAttemptAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent upload attempt.

fields.name: lastError
fields.description: Most recent failure message captured during upload retry handling.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current transfer state for the queued file.

fields.name: completedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the file upload was completed successfully.

fields.description: Retry priority used when selecting which pending file should upload next.

fields.description: Timestamp when the pending upload record was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the pending upload record was last updated.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable SFI node name describing the classified ship system, subsystem, or component area.

fields.name: parentSfiCode
fields.description: Parent SFI code used to build the hierarchy and let the system walk upward or downward through the classification tree.

fields.name: depth
fields.description: Hierarchy depth of the node so the system can distinguish top-level groups from deeper subsystem and component classifications.

fields.name: isVirtual
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this node is structural only for hierarchy navigation or represents a directly usable classification node.

payload.business_purpose: Tracks reminder delivery state for upcoming and overdue activity work histories so the system knows which users were notified, when they were notified, and whether reminder tracking is still active.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization for the reminder tracking record.

fields.name: userID
fields.description: Reference to User who should receive or has received the reminder.

fields.name: activityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to ActivityWorkHistory being monitored for reminder escalation.

fields.name: activityID
fields.description: Reference to the underlying Activity associated with the tracked reminder.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel for the due or overdue maintenance context.

fields.name: plannedDueDate
fields.description: Planned due date used to drive pre-due and overdue notifications.

fields.name: beforeDueSent
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the initial pre-due reminder was already sent.

fields.name: beforeDueSentAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the pre-due reminder was sent.

fields.name: overdueSentCount
fields.description: Number of overdue reminders already sent for this work history and user.

fields.name: lastOverdueSentAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the most recent overdue reminder was sent.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether reminder tracking is still active; typically turned off once work is committed.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the reminder tracking row was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the reminder tracking row was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Stores the planned budget envelope for a vessel, department, and budget code over a given period. It is the planning layer used to compare allocated or revised amounts against downstream allocations, commitments, accruals, and actual spend.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization that owns the budget.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable budget name or heading.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Narrative description of what the budget covers.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel when the budget is vessel-specific; null/optional for broader organizational budgets.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Budget year used for reporting and uniqueness.

fields.name: month
fields.description: Optional budget month for more granular period control.

fields.name: budgetPeriod.startDate
fields.description: Start date of the budget period window.

fields.name: budgetPeriod.endDate
fields.description: End date of the budget period window.

fields.name: budgetType
fields.description: Budget category for planning and reporting.

fields.name: budgetCodeID
fields.description: Reference to BudgetCode that classifies the spend bucket.

fields.name: allocatedAmount
fields.description: Original allocated amount approved for the period.

fields.name: revisedAllocation
fields.description: Latest revised allocation after budget changes or re-approval.

fields.name: costCenterID
fields.description: Reference to CostCenter used for departmental reporting.

fields.name: department
fields.description: Operating department to which the budget belongs.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency used for the allocated and revised values.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current control state of the budget.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: Reference to User who created the budget record.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the budget record was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the budget record was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Defines the hierarchical budget classification codes used to group and govern planned versus actual spend across procurement, maintenance, and operational activity.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization that owns the budget code catalog.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Unique budget code value within the organization.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the budget code.

fields.name: parentCodeID
fields.description: Reference to parent BudgetCode when building a hierarchy of budget heads.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the code can still be used for active planning or transactions.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the budget code was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the budget code was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Represents the financial ledger movement layer for the system. It records commitments, accruals, actuals, reversals, revisions, and credits, and becomes the core source of truth for budget consumption reporting.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization for the ledger transaction.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel when the transaction is vessel-scoped.

fields.name: budgetID
fields.description: Reference to Budget being consumed or adjusted by the transaction.

fields.name: budgetCodeID
fields.description: Reference to BudgetCode for classification of the transaction.

fields.name: costCenterID
fields.description: Reference to CostCenter charged by the transaction.

fields.name: referenceType
fields.description: Source document or workflow type that generated the financial movement.

fields.name: referenceID
fields.description: Identifier of the source record that produced the transaction.

fields.name: transactionType
fields.description: Financial lifecycle state of the transaction in the ledger.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Signed or absolute monetary value represented by the transaction.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency used for the transaction amount.

fields.name: transactionDate
fields.description: Effective date of the financial movement.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional narrative explaining the movement or reconciliation context.

fields.name: performedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who created or posted the transaction.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Flexible reconciliation or reporting metadata stored with the ledger line.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the ledger row was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the ledger row was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Connects planned or actual cost to an activity work history, inventory movement, or ad-hoc service/labour entry before full ledger posting. It is the bridge between operational events and budget control.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization that owns the allocation.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel when the allocation is vessel-specific.

fields.name: activityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to ActivityWorkHistory when the allocation originates from maintenance execution.

fields.name: inventoryTransactionID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryTransaction when the allocation originates from stock movement.

fields.name: serviceProvider
fields.description: Service or labour provider name for external or ad-hoc cost lines.

fields.name: isAdHoc
fields.description: True when the allocation is created without an activity or inventory source and represents ad-hoc service/labour.

fields.name: serviceItems
fields.description: Optional breakdown of service/labour line items including quantity and unit cost.

fields.name: budgetID
fields.description: Reference to Budget receiving the allocation.

fields.name: budgetCodeID
fields.description: Reference to BudgetCode used to classify the allocation.

fields.name: costCenterID
fields.description: Reference to CostCenter charged by the allocation.

fields.name: estimatedCost
fields.description: Estimated cost expected before reconciliation.

fields.name: actualCost
fields.description: Actual cost eventually recognized for the allocation.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency used for estimated and actual values.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Narrative explanation of what the allocation covers.

fields.name: allocatedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who created the budget allocation.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Optional free-text notes for estimation or reconciliation context.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state of the allocation.

fields.name: allocationType
fields.description: High-level source classification for the allocation.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the allocation was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the allocation was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Stores auditable changes to budget master records, including state changes, field updates, and reason codes. It supports financial governance and change accountability.

fields.name: budgetID
fields.description: Reference to Budget whose change was logged.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization for scoping the audit row.

fields.name: modifiedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who made the budget change.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the budget change occurred.

fields.name: budgetStatus
fields.description: Budget status captured at the time of change.

fields.name: changeReason
fields.description: Business reason explaining why the budget was changed.

fields.name: changeType
fields.description: Type of budget change recorded in the audit trail.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Array describing old and new values for each changed budget field.

fields.name: metadata.ipAddress
fields.description: Optional originating client IP captured with the audit event.

fields.name: metadata.userAgent
fields.description: Optional user-agent captured with the audit event.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the audit row was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the audit row was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Captures audit history for BudgetAllocation records so the system can explain who created, updated, deleted, or changed allocation status over time.

fields.name: allocationID
fields.description: Reference to BudgetAllocation whose change was logged.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization for audit scoping.

fields.name: modifiedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who changed the allocation.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the allocation change occurred.

fields.name: changeType
fields.description: Type of allocation change captured in the audit trail.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Array describing before/after field values for the allocation change.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Optional metadata such as client IP and user agent captured with the audit event.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the audit row was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the audit row was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Defines the organizational cost center dimension used to group budgets, allocations, transactions, invoices, and other spend records for reporting and control.

fields.name: organizationID

payload.business_purpose: Stores the signal vocabulary used to map crew certificates, training, and medical evidence to operational competency requirements such as STCW, tanker, polar, DP, or offshore readiness.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization that owns the competency signal catalog.

fields.name: signalID
fields.description: Unique signal identifier used by the competency rules layer.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Human-readable label presented for the competency signal.

fields.name: sections
fields.description: Document sections where the competency evidence is expected to come from.

fields.name: mapsToRequirementIDs
fields.description: Requirement IDs that this signal satisfies or helps evaluate.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: Display and evaluation ordering value for the signal.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the competency signal is active.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: Reference to User who created the signal.

fields.name: updatedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who last updated the signal.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the signal was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the signal was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Stores supplier invoices linked to purchase orders, maintenance work, budget allocations, and cost centers. It is the financial execution layer that helps move cost recognition from accrual toward actual settlement.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization that owns the invoice.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel when the invoice is vessel-scoped.

fields.name: purchaseOrderID
fields.description: Reference to PurchaseOrder against which the supplier invoice is raised.

fields.name: activityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to ActivityWorkHistory for maintenance-linked invoices.

fields.name: budgetAllocationID
fields.description: Reference to BudgetAllocation connected to the invoice.

fields.name: budgetID
fields.description: Reference to Budget charged by the invoice.

fields.name: budgetCodeID
fields.description: Reference to BudgetCode used for invoice classification.

fields.name: costCenterID
fields.description: Reference to CostCenter charged by the invoice.

fields.name: invoiceNumber
fields.description: Unique supplier invoice number within the organization.

fields.name: invoiceDate
fields.description: Date shown on the supplier invoice.

fields.name: dueDate
fields.description: Payment due date for the invoice.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency used for the invoice values.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Array of invoiced lines including description, quantity, unit price, and total price.

fields.name: subTotal
fields.description: Invoice subtotal before tax or other additions.

fields.name: taxAmount
fields.description: Tax component captured on the invoice.

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.description: Total payable invoice amount.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current workflow and settlement state of the invoice.

fields.name: paymentDate
fields.description: Date when the invoice was paid or settled.

fields.name: paymentReference
fields.description: Reference number or identifier for the payment transaction.

fields.name: approvedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who approved the invoice.

fields.name: approvedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice was approved.

fields.name: settledBy
fields.description: Reference to User who marked the invoice settled.

fields.name: settledAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice was settled.

fields.name: documents
fields.description: Attached file references or supporting invoice documents.

fields.name: remarks
fields.description: Optional remarks about approval, reconciliation, or settlement.

fields.name: cancellationReason
fields.description: Reason captured when an invoice is cancelled.

fields.name: cancelledAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice was cancelled.

fields.name: processedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who processed the invoice operationally.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Defines hourly labour rates by rank and optionally by vessel. These rates support maintenance labour costing and help convert man-hours into comparable financial values.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization that owns the labour rate card.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel when the rate is vessel-specific; optional/null for organization-wide defaults.

fields.name: rank
fields.description: Crew or labour rank to which the hourly rate applies.

fields.name: hourlyRate
fields.description: Hourly labour cost used for costing and variance analysis.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency used for the labour rate.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the labour rate is still active.

fields.name: effectiveFrom
fields.description: Date from which the labour rate becomes effective.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the labour rate was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the labour rate was last updated.

payload.business_purpose: Tracks material landing orders for moving inventory from a source location toward vessel or port context. It captures requested versus received quantities, condition on receipt, and supporting delivery documents.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to Organization that owns the landing order.

fields.name: orderNumber
fields.description: Unique landing order number, typically generated in MLO format.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel receiving or associated with the landing order.

fields.name: fromLocationID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryLocation from which material is being landed.

fields.name: portLocation
fields.description: Port or delivery place relevant to the landing operation.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current workflow state of the landing order.

fields.name: lineItems.partID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryPart being transferred or landed.

fields.name: lineItems.requestedQuantity
fields.description: Requested quantity for the landed part.

fields.name: lineItems.receivedQuantity
fields.description: Quantity actually received for the landed part.

fields.name: lineItems.condition
fields.description: Condition of the received item on landing.

fields.name: lineItems.fromLocationID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryLocation for the specific line item source.

fields.name: lineItems.comments
fields.description: Optional line-level comments on delivery condition or handling.

fields.name: requestedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who requested the landing order.

fields.name: receivedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who confirmed receipt of the landing order.

fields.name: documents
fields.description: Attached transport, receipt, or supporting document metadata.

fields.name: remarks
fields.description: Optional remarks recorded for the landing order.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the landing order was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the landing order was last updated.

fields.name: updatedAt
